response.justification: Mohammed has strong distributed systems experience, deep full-stack proficiency, and clear ownership mindset through startup and open-source leadership, but lacks explicit evidence of AI-native engineering exposure or agentic code review workflows, and his Python skills are unmentioned despite being a must-have.
strengths: Proven experience in high-throughput, distributed systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong operational ownership demonstrated via DevOps setup, on-call readiness, and open-source project leadership
Broad technical breadth across languages and domains, with clear adaptability to evolving tech stacks
concerns: No explicit mention of Python expertise — a core must-have skill for the role
No clear evidence of working in an AI-driven code generation environment or reviewing AI-generated code at scale
Limited indication of stakeholder coordination or agile scrum champion experience beyond general IC work
